base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of light_woods_tileset — a tile from 1987 castlevania ii simons quest. Light Woods atlas — thinner tree-trunks, grass floor. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Light Woods atlas — thinner tree-trunks, grass floor; used in early-game woods near towns
